## Privacy and security review

- [ ] No credentials, recovery codes, patient information, source slides, private links, databases, or `.env` values are included
- [ ] Public paths cannot expose originals, temporary uploads, private derivatives, logs, or secrets
- [ ] Authentication, CSRF, throttling, audit redaction, and generated identifiers remain intact where applicable
- [ ] Screenshots and logs have been reviewed for sensitive information
